skill.name: ckm:slides
skill.description: Create strategic HTML presentations with Chart.js, design tokens, responsive layouts, copywriting formulas, and contextual slide strategies.
skill.summary: Create persuasive HTML slide decks with Chart.js data visualization, design tokens, responsive layouts, and proven copywriting formulas.
skill.author: nextlevelbuilder

security_audit.summary: The skill consists of documentation and reference files for creating HTML presentations. The static analyzer flagged 121 patterns, but all are false positives. 'Weak cryptographic algorithm' warnings match on CSS keywords like 'key' and 'signature' used in presentation contexts. 'Ruby/shell backtick execution' warnings match on markdown code formatting. Network references point to legitimate CDNs (cdn.jsdelivr.net for Chart.js, images.pexels.com for stock images). No executable scripts or malicious code patterns were found.

low_findings.title: External CDN Resource Loading
low_findings.description: Template loads Chart.js library from cdn.jsdelivr.net CDN. This is a standard, legitimate CDN used for open-source libraries. No malicious intent detected.

low_findings.title: External Image References
low_findings.description: Template references images from images.pexels.com for background images. Pexels is a legitimate stock photography platform.

content.user_title: Create Strategic HTML Presentations with Data Visualization
content.value_statement: Building persuasive slide decks from scratch takes hours of design and copywriting work. This skill provides proven templates, Chart.js integration, and copywriting formulas to create professional presentations quickly.
actual_capabilities: Generates HTML slide decks with 16:9 aspect ratio and responsive breakpoints for mobile and tablet
Integrates Chart.js for data visualization including line, bar, doughnut, and radar charts
Applies design tokens (CSS custom properties) for consistent colors, typography, and gradients
Provides 25 copywriting formulas including PAS, AIDA, FAB, and Cost of Inaction
Offers 15 proven deck structures like YC Seed Deck, Sales Pitch, and Product Demo
Includes 25 layout patterns with animation classes for visual polish
limitations: Output is HTML-based and requires a browser to view; not compatible with PowerPoint or Keynote
Chart.js is loaded from CDN, requiring internet access for initial render
No real-time collaboration features like Google Slides
Limited to static data input; no live database connections

use_cases.title: Startup Pitch Decks
use_cases.description: Founders creating investor presentations for seed or Series A funding rounds using proven YC deck structures.

use_cases.title: Sales Enablement
use_cases.description: Sales teams building product demo decks and pitch presentations with persuasive copywriting formulas.

use_cases.title: Internal Communications
use_cases.description: Managers creating QBR reports, all-hands updates, and board meeting presentations with data visualization.

prompt_templates.title: Quick Title Slide
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a title slide for a presentation about [topic] with a compelling hook.

prompt_templates.title: Data Visualization
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a metrics dashboard slide showing [metric 1], [metric 2], [metric 3] with a Chart.js bar chart for monthly revenue.

prompt_templates.title: Problem-Solution Structure
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 5-slide pitch using the PAS formula: problem slide, agitation slide, solution overview, features grid, and CTA closing.

prompt_templates.title: Full YC Deck
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a complete 10-slide YC seed deck for a [industry] startup with title, problem, solution, traction chart, market sizing, product, business model, team, financials, and ask slides.

output_examples.input: Create a title slide for a fintech startup called 'PayFlow' that simplifies cross-border payments
output_examples.output:
Title: 'PayFlow: Borderless Payments, Instantly'
Subtitle: 'Send money globally in under 30 seconds'
Layout: Centered title with gradient text, fade-up animation

output_examples.input: Add a traction chart showing monthly recurring revenue growth from $5K to $45K over 4 months
output_examples.output: Chart.js line chart with months (Sep-Dec) on x-axis and MRR values on y-axis. Red border color matching primary brand color, smooth tension curve, semi-transparent fill area below the line.

output_examples.input: Build a problem slide about slow international wire transfers
output_examples.output:
Problem: 'International transfers take 3-5 business days.'
Agitate: 'In a real-time economy, waiting days for your own money costs deals, delays payroll, and frustrates teams.'
Solution intro: 'PayFlow settles in 30 seconds.'

best_practices: Always use the slide knowledge database search commands to find the right layout for your content type and position
Apply design tokens consistently across slides for cohesive branding and easy theme updates
Follow the emotion arc guidance for deck strategies to maintain audience engagement throughout
anti_patterns: Do not skip the navigation and progress bar components as they are essential for presenter mode
Avoid using more than 6 metric cards on a single dashboard slide to prevent visual clutter
Do not load Chart.js from a non-CDN source or inline the full library in your HTML

faq.question: What tools is this skill compatible with?
faq.answer: This skill works with Claude, Claude Code, and Codex AI coding assistants.

faq.question: Does it work offline?
faq.answer: No, Chart.js is loaded from a CDN, so an internet connection is required on first load. After caching, slides can be viewed offline.

faq.question: Can I export slides to PowerPoint?
faq.answer: No, this skill generates HTML presentations only. You can screenshot slides or use browser print to PDF for static exports.

faq.question: How many slide layouts are available?
faq.answer: The skill provides 25 layout patterns including title slides, feature grids, metrics dashboards, comparison tables, and CTA closings.

faq.question: Is Chart.js the only charting library supported?
faq.answer: Yes, the templates are configured for Chart.js. You can modify the code to use other libraries like D3.js or ApexCharts if needed.

faq.question: What copywriting frameworks are included?
faq.answer: The skill includes 25 formulas including PAS, AIDA, FAB, Cost of Inaction, Before-After-Bridge, and Social Proof patterns.
